<!-- Generated by the i18n-triage workflow (33 agents, 286 files). Report-only audit; no app code changed. -->

# English-Mode Codemod Migration Manifest

**App:** Antagna (`apps/web`) · next-intl + locale cookie · ~286 Arabic-bearing files
**Goal:** Safe, route-by-route auto-extraction of Arabic display strings to `t()` keys, leaving logic-bearing and model-facing Arabic untouched.

---

## 1. Executive Summary

### Totals per bucket (Arabic-literal occurrences)

| Bucket | Count | Codemod treatment |
|---|---:|---|
| `display` | **3,238** | ✅ Auto-extract (JSX text, props, labels, returned toast/error copy) |
| `prompt` | **114** | ⛔ NEVER touch — LLM system/user messages, few-shot, tool descriptions |
| `data_key` | **707** | ⛔ NEVER inline-extract — enum-keyed Records, regexes, positional arrays, SQL/DB literals |
| `mock` | **94** | ⏭️ Skip — seed/fixture/demo content |
| `comment` | **74** | ⏭️ Skip — JSDoc/inline comments |
| `needs_human` | **431** | 🔶 Hand-migrate — interpolated/templated/tone-sensitive, audit-log summaries |

### File classification (by verdict)

- **`safe_display` (fast lane):** ~78 files — pure or near-pure extractable display. The bulk of every `admin/*/page.tsx`, `auth/*`, `settings/*`, most `equipment/new|scan|reservations`, `social/*Panel/*Workspace` (consumer side), `packages/ui/*` shell components.
- **`mixed` (needs care):** ~95 files — display + interpolation hazards and/or one embedded `data_key` Record; safe to run codemod **only if** it skips flagged lines.
- **`danger` (codemod must skip whole file or all flagged lines):** ~55 files — contain `prompt`, regex/positional `data_key`, transliteration tables, or persisted `summaryAr` audit copy.
- **`mock_only` / `comment_only` / `no_user_arabic`:** ~10 files — nothing to extract (`seed-actions.ts`, `board-section.tsx`, `ai/actions.ts`, `lib/drive.ts`, `lib/whatsapp.ts`, `cards/utils.tsx`, `AIHints.tsx`).

**Key structural insight:** the single highest-leverage migration is **not** per-file at all — it's the **shared enum→label glossary** files (`constants.ts`, `_shared.tsx`, `catalog.ts`, `notif-prefs.ts`, `project-stage.ts`, `format.ts`). They hold ~350 of the 707 `data_key` strings as `Record<EnumKey, ArabicValue>`. Migrate these **once** as typed `t('namespace.'+key)` resolvers; every consuming route then renders English automatically with zero per-file edits.

---

## 2. ⛔ DANGER REGISTER — Never Auto-Extract

These are the landmines. Each line below would **break runtime behavior** (LLM prompts, regex matching, lookup keys, positional indexing, slug generation, or persisted audit logs) if a codemod replaced the Arabic in place.

### A. LIVE LLM PROMPTS (`prompt`) — extracting corrupts the model

| File | Lines | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/web/src/app/dashboard/briefing-actions.ts` | 10–55 (all) | `BRIEFING_SYSTEM` system prompt + few-shot Arabic tone examples |
| `apps/web/src/app/dashboard/my-day-actions.ts` | 85–94, 104–156 | `ROUTINE_SYSTEM` + `buildRoutineContext` user message |
| `apps/web/src/app/inbox/actions.ts` | 33–56, 98–280, 326–426 | 3 system prompts + conversation/classifier builders |
| `apps/web/src/app/projects/new/actions.ts` | 25, 32, 145 | `PARSE_SYSTEM` schema examples + extraction instruction |
| `apps/web/src/app/projects/[id]/ai-actions.ts` | 14, 15 | risk-analyzer `SYSTEM` field instructions |
| `apps/web/src/app/equipment/actions.ts` | 126–130 | Anthropic **vision** prompt (`identifyEquipmentPhoto`) |
| `apps/web/src/app/performance/weekly-report-actions.ts` | 61–90 | `WEEKLY_SYSTEM` schema + few-shot + output token `بانتظار البيانات` |
| `apps/web/src/app/api/internal/quotation-followup/route.ts` | 215, 219, 226, 228 | sales-followup system + user + AI fallback texts |
| `apps/web/src/lib/ai-center-brief.ts` | 15–21, 57–72 | `BRIEF_SYSTEM` + `gatherStats` user message |
| `apps/web/src/lib/email-intel/extract.ts` | 41, 43, 47 | few-shot scope/next-step examples + Abu Luka business-line terms |
| `apps/web/src/lib/gmail-summarize.ts` | 252, 271 | cross-channel + memory-context notes injected into user message |
| `apps/web/src/lib/quotation-analysis.ts` | 164, 213–230 | embedding query + facts block + system + user turn |
| `apps/web/src/lib/whatsapp-bot.ts` | 44, 60, 73, 85, 102, 139 | Anthropic tool descriptions + system few-shot |
| `apps/web/src/lib/email-intel/conversation.ts` | (SYSTEM is English; 175 is memory-content) | — see §C |

### B. REGEX / DETECTION / POSITIONAL LOGIC (`data_key`) — exact bytes are load-bearing

| File | Lines | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/web/src/components/TranslateLayer.tsx` | 17, 19, 24, 29–34 | The translation engine itself — regex ranges + switch-case punctuation mapping |
| `apps/web/src/lib/detect-lang.ts` | 16 | `/[؀-ۿ]/` script-detection range |
| `apps/web/src/lib/email-intel/execute.ts` | 103 | Arabic range inside slug-building regex |
| `apps/web/src/app/inbox/[threadId]/EmailBody.tsx` | 15, 16 | `QUOTE_RE` quoted-history split + `HAS_ARABIC` translation gate |
| `apps/web/src/app/admin/ai-insights/page.tsx` | 157, 158, 159 | Arabic alternations inside `outcomeTone` `.test()` classification |
| `apps/web/src/app/admin/integrations/email-routes/actions.ts` | 96, 103, 111 | `matchSubjectRegex` — exact-byte email-subject routing |
| `apps/web/src/app/clients/actions.ts` | 16–21 | `AR_TRANSLIT` — Arabic letters as **keys** for slug transliteration |
| `apps/web/src/app/clients/new/new-client-form.tsx` | 207 (rep. 208–212) | `matchIndustry` regexes (`عقار`/`سيار`/…) classifying AI output |
| `apps/web/src/app/calendar/page.tsx` | 30, 31, 130, 156 | `WEEKDAYS_AR`/`MONTHS_AR` positional arrays + `'حجز: '` prefix `startsWith` |
| `apps/web/src/app/dashboard/board.tsx` | 27 | `WEEKDAYS_AR` positional lookup |
| `apps/web/src/app/dashboard/cards/utils.tsx` | 28 | `'٠١٢٣…'` Arabic-Indic digit `charAt` table (`toAr`) |
| `apps/web/src/app/social/calendar-grid.tsx` | 18, 20–31 | `WEEK_HEADER_AR` (React keys) + `MONTH_AR` positional |
| `apps/web/src/app/social/calendar/page.tsx` | 17–20 | `MONTH_AR` positional month lookup |
| `apps/web/src/app/projects/new/actions.ts` | 332 | `fmt === 'صور'` exact-byte equality |
| `apps/web/src/app/projects/new/intake-form.tsx` | 52 | `PHOTO_FORMATS.includes('صور')` comparison |
| `apps/web/src/lib/whatsapp-bot.ts` | 126, 127, 619, 696 | language-switch trigger phrases + confidence `.test()` regexes |
| `apps/web/src/lib/format.ts` | 80, 84–86, 100 | locale **primitives** (`الآن`/`د`/`س`/`يوم`/`ر.س`) the translate layer defers to |

### C. PERSISTED AUDIT / DB / MEMORY LITERALS (`data_key` / `needs_human`) — extracting corrupts stored records

| File | Lines | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/web/src/app/clients/actions.ts` | 345, 348, 349 | `memText` fed to `indexMemory` (embeddings brain) |
| `apps/web/src/app/projects/[id]/ai-actions.ts` | 202 | interpolated memory content → `indexMemory` |
| `apps/web/src/lib/email-intel/conversation.ts` | 175 | `الحالة:` label in brain-memory content |
| `apps/web/src/lib/email-intel/extract.ts` | 355, 361 | `indexMemory` brain content templates |
| `apps/web/src/lib/email-intel/generate.ts` | 134–267 | `summaryAr` persisted on `ai_suggestions` + default project title (166) |
| `apps/web/src/lib/quotation-analysis.ts` | 136 | `indexMemory` embedding content |
| `apps/web/src/app/intake/actions.ts` | 58 | `'أبو لوكا'` written to `clients.name_ar` (business data) |
| `apps/web/src/app/intake/intake-card.tsx` | 267 | `'أبو لوكا'` form-state default mirroring DB |
| `apps/web/src/app/projects/new/actions.ts` | 313–317 | `groupName` → `deliverable_groups.name_ar` DB literals |
| `apps/web/src/app/dashboard/pm-board.ts` | 60, 91 | SQL `COALESCE` fallbacks baked into result set |
| **`writeActivity` / `summaryAr` audit files** (do **not** route to `t()`) | various | persisted bilingual audit channel, many interpolated |

`summaryAr`/audit-only danger files (skip entirely): `admin/compatibility/actions.ts`, `admin/departments/actions.ts`, `admin/locations/actions.ts`, `admin/stage-templates/actions.ts`, `admin/tags/actions.ts`, `approvals/actions.ts`, `contacts/actions.ts`, `crm/actions.ts`, `employees/actions.ts`, `meetings/actions.ts`, `tasks/actions.ts`, `social/actions.ts`, `equipment/[id]/actions.ts`, `equipment/repairs/actions.ts`, `equipment/reservations/actions.ts`, `projects/[id]/actions.ts`, `projects/[id]/approval-actions.ts`, `projects/[id]/deliverables-actions.ts`, `projects/[id]/edit/actions.ts`, `projects/[id]/revision-actions.ts`, `whatsapp/actions.ts`, `attendance/actions.ts`, `clients/actions.ts` (summaryAr lines).

### D. SHARED ENUM→LABEL GLOSSARIES (`data_key`) — migrate the map ONCE, never inline

These are display *in spirit* but live as `Record<EnumKey, ArabicValue>` consumed by `MAP[key]`. A per-file JSX codemod can't reach them and must not. Replace each with a `t('ns.'+key)` resolver.

| File | Lines | Map(s) |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/web/src/app/social/_shared.tsx` | 16–87 | `PLATFORM/POST_STATUS/FORMAT/DEAL_TYPE/DEAL_STATUS/ACCESS_TYPE_LABEL_AR` (33 values) |
| `apps/web/src/app/dashboard/cards/catalog.ts` | 39–83 | `CARD_CATALOG` titleAr/desc (~66) |
| `apps/web/src/app/admin/stage-templates/constants.ts` | 22–72 | `STAGE_LABEL_AR` + `ROLE_LABEL_AR` (28) |
| `apps/web/src/app/admin/custom-fields/constants.ts` | 39–61 | `ENTITY_LABEL_AR` + `FIELD_TYPE_LABEL_AR` (20) |
| `apps/web/src/app/system-map/graph-data.ts` | 29–66 | `CAT_LABEL` + `NODES[].label` canvas (27) |
| `apps/web/src/app/settings/notif-prefs.ts` | 14–63 | `CHANNELS` + `NOTIFICATION_EVENTS` (12) |
| `apps/web/src/app/welcome/page.tsx` | 40–53 | `capLabels` (14) |
| `apps/web/src/app/team/[id]/page.tsx` | 18–24 | `ROLE_AR` (7) |
| `apps/web/src/app/admin/groups/constants.ts` | 15–18 | `PURPOSE_LABEL_AR` (4) |
| `apps/web/src/app/inbox/[threadId]/page.tsx` | 89–151 | `STATUS_AR/CATEGORY_AR/IMPORTANCE_AR/REPLY_LABEL/ACTION_LABEL` (27) |
| `apps/web/src/app/inbox/InboxThreads.tsx` | 64–90 | `STATUS_LABEL/CATEGORY_LABEL/IMPORTANCE_LABEL` (14) |
| `apps/web/src/app/equipment/[id]/page.tsx` | 33–190 | `STATUS_AR` + `SPEC_LABELS_AR` volt-os glossary (27) |
| **plus** | — | every `STATUS_LABEL_AR`/`*_AR` Record in `crm/`, `orders/`, `meetings/`, `freelancers/`, `talents/`, `employees/`, `equipment/*`, `attendance/page.tsx`, `p/[token]/page.tsx`, `search/page.tsx`, etc. |

> **Rule for the codemod:** any Arabic that is (a) a `RegExp` literal/argument, (b) a `Record`/array value indexed by an English key or numeric position, (c) an argument to `writeActivity`/`indexMemory`/`anthropic.messages.create`, (d) inside `metadata`/SQL/`encodeURIComponent`, or (e) a `confirm()`/`throw new Error()` arg in a server action → **skip**.

---

## 3. Recommended Codemod ROUTE ORDER

Each phase is gated by the verification recipe in §5. Counts are `display`-bucket files in that route group.

### PHASE 0 — Shared glossary + shell (do first, unblocks everything)
Migrate the §2.D maps to `t('enum.<key>')` resolvers and wire `packages/ui` shell labels. **No JSX codemod here — structured hand/script migration of the Records, plus already-`key`-bearing nav.**

| Target | Display | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| `packages/ui/src/components/AppShell.tsx` | 30 | NAV items already carry i18n `key`; supply `labels` map, keep Arabic as fallback |
| `packages/ui/src/components/CommandPalette.tsx` | 18 | pure safe — `TYPE_LABEL`/`QUICK_ACTIONS` English-keyed |
| `packages/ui/src/components/ListWorkspace.tsx` | 9 | pure safe |
| `packages/ui/src/components/MobileNav.tsx`, `ErrorState.tsx`, `FileUpload.tsx`, `NotificationsBell.tsx`, `DashCard.tsx` | ~15 | safe (NotificationsBell `timeAgo` lines → needs_human) |
| All §2.D glossary files | — | **one-time map migration**, highest leverage |
| `apps/web/src/lib/project-stage.ts` | 12 | clean `t('projectStage.<key>')` — feeds many routes |

### PHASE 1 — Pure-safe display routes (fast lane, batch aggressively)
`safe_display` verdict, no embedded `data_key`/`prompt`. Run the JSX codemod, typecheck, build, Playwright assert.

| Route group | Files / Display | Pace |
|---|---|---|
| **Auth** (`auth/*`, `login`, `register/page`, `pending`, `welcome/welcome-flow`) | ~9 files / ~70 | **pure safe** ⚡ |
| **Admin pages** (`admin/*/page.tsx`, `system/panels/*`, `console`, `email-routes/*`, `google/*`, `whatsapp/page`) | ~40 files / ~400 | **mostly pure** ⚡ (panels with `${count}` subs → needs_human only) |
| **Settings** (`settings/*`) | ~6 files / ~50 | **pure safe** ⚡ |
| **Equipment leaf** (`new/*`, `scan/*`, `reservations/page`, `orders/page`, `orders/.../print-button`, `LineItemsEditor`) | ~12 files / ~120 | **pure safe** ⚡ |
| **Social consumer panels** (`AccountsPanel`, `AccountsWorkspace`, `ComposerPanel`, `SnapshotRecorder`, `SocialTabs`, `AnalyticsBars`, `accounts/page`, `deals/page`) | ~8 files / ~70 | **pure safe** ⚡ (maps live in `_shared`, done Phase 0) |
| **Misc leaf** (`error.tsx`, `offline`, `kpis/kpi-trend`, `meetings/[id]/ActionItems`, `MeetingForm`, `search/SearchBox`, `reports/revenue-chart`, `notifications/*`, `InstallPrompt`, `system-map/*`) | ~14 files / ~110 | **pure safe** ⚡ |

### PHASE 2 — High-value display-heavy MIXED routes (codemod with line-skip; needs care)
Highest user-facing surface. Run codemod **excluding** the `dangerLines` listed in the JSON; queue those lines into the §4 backlog.

| Route | Display | data_key on file? | Pace |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `projects/[id]/page.tsx` | **70** | yes (1718–1730 `STATUS_LABEL_AR`) | mixed, careful |
| `clients/[id]/page.tsx` | 38 | 1 fallback | mixed |
| `crm/page.tsx` | 40 | `SUGG_LABEL` | mixed |
| `ai/page.tsx` | 38 | maps English-keyed (safe) | mostly safe |
| `equipment/page.tsx` *(usesIntl)* | 28 | none | mixed, extend `pages.equipment` |
| `equipment/metrics/page.tsx` | 40 | none | mixed (AIHint templates) |
| `equipment/kits/KitBuilder.tsx` | 38 | `IMPORTANCE_AR` | mixed |
| `inbox/InboxThreads.tsx` | 48 | 4 maps (done Phase 0) | mixed, careful |
| `inbox/page.tsx` | 27 | none | mixed (AIHint templates) |
| `inbox/[threadId]/page.tsx` | 28 | 5 maps (Phase 0) | mixed, careful |
| `projects/page.tsx` *(usesIntl)* | 45 | none | mixed, extend `pages.projects` |
| `dashboard/cards/cards.tsx` | 38 | none (60 **mock**) | mixed — skip SAMPLE_* |
| `equipment/repairs/RepairsWorkspace.tsx` | 40 | `STATUS_AR`/`SEVERITY_AR` | mixed |
| `equipment/reservations/ReservationsManager.tsx` | 33 | 2 maps | mixed |
| `projects/new/intake-form.tsx` | 75 | `PHOTO_FORMATS` (52) | mixed, careful |
| `quotations/page.tsx` | 30 | `LIKELIHOOD_AR` | mixed |
| `reports/page.tsx` | 24 | none | mixed |
| `tasks/page.tsx` *(usesIntl)* | 14 | none | mixed |
| `social/page.tsx` *(usesIntl)* | 24 | none | mixed |

### PHASE 3 — Remaining mixed + server-action display copy (slow lane)
`attendance/*`, `meetings/*`, `orders/[id]/*`, `talents/*`, `freelancers/*`, `employees/*`, `contacts/*`, `assets/*`, `whatsapp/[thread]/*`, `settings/whatsapp/*`, `intake/page`, `inbox/suggestions/*`, plus server-action **static** error strings (e.g. `auth/actions.ts`, `admin/alert-actions.ts`, `register/actions.ts`, `settings/actions.ts`) via `getTranslations`. Per-route, careful.

### PHASE 4 — Hand-only
The §4 backlog. No codemod.

---

## 4. `needs_human` Backlog (interpolation / tone-sensitive)

431 sites. Patterns, not a flat list — triage by class:

1. **Count + Arabic noun (ICU plural)** — the dominant class. Every `AIHint`/`AIHints` headline & `StatBox`/`CardHeader` subtitle: e.g. `projects/[id]/page.tsx` 532–594, `equipment/page.tsx` 174–334, `inbox/page.tsx` 236–299, `crm/page.tsx` 215–260, `tasks/page.tsx` 144–286, `kpis/page.tsx` 118–152, `reports/page.tsx` 162–201, `team/page.tsx` 118–146. → convert to `t('key', {count})` with ICU `plural`.
2. **Relative-time unit families** — `lib/format.ts` 84–86, `NotificationsBell.tsx` 16–21, `RealtimeComments.tsx` 168–173, `subs-panel.tsx` 28–31, `quotation-analysis.ts` 281–284, `board.tsx`/`dashboard` `arRel`. → use next-intl relative-time; keep unit family intact.
3. **Interpolated user data** (names, codes, titles) mid-sentence — `departments/...` 104/175, `clients/new/page.tsx` 65, `pending/page.tsx` 40, `ViewAsBar.tsx` 69, `welcome-flow.tsx` 98, `weekly-report-card.tsx` 124, `signups/*` 48/83.
4. **`confirm()` / destructive copy** — `RowControls.tsx` 56, `MemberControls.tsx` 33, `SquadSettings.tsx` 25, `TagsManager.tsx` 192/193, `LocationsManager.tsx` 183/445, `settings/whatsapp/link-panel.tsx` 86, colloquial Egyptian tone.
5. **Currency/percent + glyph composition** — `freelancers/[id]/page.tsx` 156, `performance/page.tsx` 101, `kpis/page.tsx` 211, `cost-panel.tsx` 101/110, any `${n} ر.س` / `${n}٪`.
6. **Fragmented JSX (text split around `<Link>`/`<strong>`/`{' '}`)** — `login/page.tsx` 20, `settings/whatsapp/page.tsx` 93/97, `google/page.tsx` 99 (guillem-referenced button label), `MeetingForm.tsx` 115 (`\n`-joined placeholder).

---

## 5. Batch Size + Per-Route Verification Recipe

Run the codemod **one route group at a time** (Phase 1: batches of 8–12 pure-safe files; Phase 2/3: **one file per commit**, since each carries `dangerLines` that must be excluded). For every batch: (1) **typecheck** — `pnpm --filter web typecheck` (catches a malformed `t()` insertion or a broken `Record` import immediately); (2) **build** — `pnpm --filter web build` (catches RSC/`getTranslations`-vs-`useTranslations` context errors — server pages need `getTranslations`, client islands need `useTranslations`, and server-action files need async `getTranslations` not a hook); (3) **Playwright with `locale=en`** — set the locale cookie, navigate each migrated route, and assert **no Arabic codepoint** (`/[\u0600-\u06FF\u0750-\u077F]/`) appears in `document.body.innerText`, **with danger panels excluded** from the assertion: scope the check to the migrated subtree and explicitly skip elements whose text originates from (a) DB data (`name_ar`/`title_ar` columns — these are data, not chrome and stay Arabic), (b) `data-i18n-skip` nodes (e.g. `LocaleSwitch`), (c) AI-generated runtime content (enrichment summaries, brief output, AI suggestions), and (d) any `dangerLines` deferred to the §4 backlog. A failed assertion that points at a known `data_key`/glossary value means Phase 0 wasn't wired for that namespace — fix the resolver, not the route. Commit per green batch (`git commit` on a feature branch, never `main`); small commits keep any bad extraction one `git revert` away.
